diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support, this is Maya. How can I help?
[Caller] I bought a crystal pack through Apple — it charged my card, Apple sent a receipt, but the crystals never showed up in the game. It's been an hour.
[Agent] That's definitely not how it should work, and I can absolutely fix this. Let me pull your account — UID please?
[Caller] 832458917.
[Agent] Thanks, Kaito. To match the Apple transaction, can you read me the last 4 digits of the Apple receipt transaction ID? It's in the email from Apple.
[Caller] Sure — ends in 8103.
[Agent] Got it. Cross-referencing with our payment reconciliation... I can see Apple's confirmation came in successfully, but the delivery webhook to our inventory service failed to fire — a known edge case that happens to a small percentage of iOS transactions during peak hours. Your money went through, our system just missed the handoff.
[Caller] So the money left but I got nothing?
[Agent] Exactly, and I have full authority to fix it on the spot. I see the pack was the 3,280 Genesis Crystal tier — 29.99 USD. I'm manually crediting 3,280 Genesis Crystals plus the 3,280 first-time bonus to your account now. Give it 30 seconds and refresh your inventory.
[Caller] OK... yes! They're here. Full 6,560.
[Agent] Perfect. I've also filed an internal ticket referencing your receipt ID so engineering can trace the delivery hook failure. You do not need to do anything further on the Apple side — no chargeback, no Apple refund request, the charge stays and you received exactly what you paid for.
[Caller] Great, I was worried I'd have to fight with Apple support.
[Agent] No need. I'll also send you an in-game mail with 100 Primogems as a small apology for the inconvenience — should arrive within 5 minutes, expires in 30 days so open it soon.
[Caller] Oh, thank you, that's really kind.
[Agent] It's the least we can do when our side dropped the ball. Anything else I can help with?
[Caller] No, that was it. Thank you Maya.
[Agent] My pleasure, Kaito. Enjoy the pulls!
